title: Heritage Foods Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Heritage Foods Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Heritage Foods Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Heritage Foods Retail:
Heritage Foods Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail!
